summary: Comprehensive testing of new Referral Programme and Training Academy features completed. Backend API tests: 27/27 passed (100%). Frontend UI tests: All critical flows verified for Worker, Employer, and Admin roles. Bug fix /api/auth/me returning 401 confirmed. Referral and Academy features fully functional.
passed_tests: Bug fix: /api/auth/me returns 401 (not 403) when no token provided
Backend: GET /api/referral/code returns referral code (ED-XXXX format)
Backend: GET /api/referral/stats returns tier info (tier, total_referrals, bonus stats)
Backend: GET /api/referral/history returns referral list
Backend: GET /api/admin/referrals returns platform-wide referral data (total_count, total_bonus_liability)
Backend: GET /api/academy/courses returns 32+ seeded courses
Backend: GET /api/academy/courses with category/level filters working
Backend: GET /api/academy/courses/{id} returns course detail
Backend: GET /api/academy/categories returns category list
Backend: POST /api/academy/courses/{id}/enroll enrolls user successfully
Backend: GET /api/academy/my-courses returns user enrollments
Backend: POST /api/academy/courses/{id}/complete issues certificate
Backend: GET /api/academy/certificates returns user certificates
Backend: GET /api/academy/subscription returns subscription plans (monthly £29.99, annual £249.99)
Backend: POST /api/academy/subscription creates subscription
Backend: GET /api/admin/academy returns admin stats (total_courses, total_enrollments, certificates_issued)
Backend: POST /api/academy/courses allows employer to create courses (pending_review status)
Backend: GET /api/academy/my-created-courses returns employer's created courses
Backend: Role-based access control working (403 for unauthorized admin endpoints)
Frontend Worker: Login functional (worker@email.com / worker123)
Frontend Worker: Referral view displays referral code (ED-JAME9CCA), tier progress, stats
Frontend Worker: Academy Course Catalog with search and filters (category, level)
Frontend Worker: My Courses tab showing enrolled/completed courses with progress
Frontend Worker: Certificates tab showing issued certificates with status
Frontend Worker: Subscription tab showing plans with Current Plan indicator
Frontend Employer: Login functional (employer@careplus.com / employer123)
Frontend Employer: Referral view with code (ED-SARA3653)
Frontend Employer: Academy Course Catalog browsing
Frontend Employer: My Courses manage tab with Create Course button
Frontend Employer: Created courses show PENDING_REVIEW status
Frontend Admin: Login functional (admin@everduty.com / admin123)
Frontend Admin: Referral Platform Overview with Total Referrals, Total Bonus Liability, Active Referrers
Frontend Admin: Academy Overview tab with stats (34 courses, 3 enrollments, 2 completions, 2 certificates)
Frontend Admin: All Courses table with course status management
Sidebar Navigation: Referrals and Academy links visible for worker, employer, admin roles
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data (32 academy courses, test users with referral codes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Referral and Academy features are fully functional. 34 courses in academy (32 seeded + 2 employer-created PENDING_REVIEW). Worker (James Thompson) has referral code ED-JAME9CCA, 3 enrolled courses (2 completed with certificates), active monthly subscription. Employer (Sarah Mitchell) has referral code ED-SARA3653 and 2 created courses. Sidebar has duplicate nav elements for mobile/desktop - use .all() and is_visible() to find desktop version. Auth bug fix verified - /api/auth/me returns 401 when no token.
